objective: Build complete containerized openclaw gateway + 24 trading microservices with each service having dedicated postgres DB, n8n workflow orchestration, 30-min github memory backup, slash new protocol comms, complete test suite, and one-liner deployment scripts for macOS/Linux/Windows. Full system integration testing: service startup, DB connectivity, API health checks, gRPC latency <5ms, Redis event bus, telegram integration, trading endpoint validation, backup + recovery, service auto-restart. Final deliverables: docker-compose.yml, 24 Dockerfiles, 27 postgres init scripts, setup/install scripts, backup-sync.sh, complete README with one-liners, passing tests, all files committed and pushed to github
